case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORP VS K II MB

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT K II MG SHUKLA, JITENDRA K II MG ADBA SAV-ON CLEANERS $36,382.38 PRINCIPAL, $3,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,013.94 INTEREST, $303.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42,199.32, FURTHER IT IS ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF IS OWNER OF LEASED EQUIPMENT AND IS ENTITLED TO IMMEDIATE POSSESSION FROM DEFTS. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. SEE SCANNED DOC.
